payload.answer: No durable memory changes detected. The query was issued with SQL debugging disabled; treat as read-only. All existing memory cards remain as they are. If a durable update is needed, enable SQL debugging and re-run with explicit write operations.

entity_resolution.reason: debug_sql_disabled indicates non-persistent SQL-enabled state for diagnostic run; no memory changes inferred

memory_cards.statement: Brain memory system query: SELECT * FROM memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false

details: Query executed in read-only mode due to BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false
No memory cards were created, updated, or deleted
